caption: Respond to a property possession claim
paragraph1: Priority debts are debts which could lead to serious consequences if you do not pay them.
paragraph2: Excluding rent or mortgage arrears, priority debts are:
bulletList: payments for goods bought on hire purchase or conditional sale
unpaid income tax, National Insurance or VAT

guidanceLink.text: Read guidance from Citizens Advice on what counts as a priority debt (opens in new tab)

question: Do you have any priority debts?

hasPriorityDebts.required: Select if you have any priority debts
